verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Under baseline conditions it is cytoplasmic-face (inner-leaflet) and thus not accessible from outside the cell. However, documented cancer-cell ecto-display of LYN on the outer leaflet has been reported in tumor cells (ecto-kinase biology), and cell-death/stress contexts can expose inner-leaflet proteins externally. This places it in the cell_state_induced contextual bucket rather than a firm 'no'.
